overview: An intelligent secure communication platform where messages and files can only be viewed once by the intended recipient. Features behavior-based access control with anomaly detection, encrypted storage, auto-expiring links, and a full admin dashboard with access logs.
features: One-time message access — auto-deletes after viewing
Time-based expiration for messages and links
Behavior-based access control with anomaly detection
Secure unique link generation for each message
File uploads with type and size restrictions (images/PDFs, max 5MB)
Access log tracking (time, device fingerprint, IP simulation)
Admin dashboard with full audit trail
